title: SEBI's algo trading rules in 2026 — what every retail trader must know
excerpt: SEBI has fundamentally changed how retail investors can use automated systems. This comprehensive guide breaks down the new framework in plain English — what you can automate, how approval works, and what the future of retail algo trading looks like in India.

title: How to read candlestick patterns like a professional trader
excerpt: Doji, Hammer, Engulfing, Morning Star — we break down the 12 most important patterns every Indian trader must know, with real NSE chart examples.

title: RBI policy decoded — what rate changes actually do to your stocks
excerpt: Most investors panic during RBI announcements. Here's a sector-by-sector framework to understand exactly who wins and who loses when rates move.

title: Iron Condor on NIFTY — a beginner's complete step-by-step guide
excerpt: One of the most popular options strategies for sideways markets. Setup, strike selection, max profit, max loss, and when to exit — all covered.

title: FII vs DII battle — what the data says about who's really moving NIFTY
excerpt: Foreign and domestic institutions often take opposite sides of the market. Here's how to read FII/DII data and what it actually signals about market direction.
